description: The user hovers over the browser tab bar area before opening a new tab.
frame_description: The user is on the Smartraveller Italy page, looking at the Travel section.

description: The user clicks the 'New Tab' button in the browser.
frame_description: The cursor is at the top of the browser window on the new tab icon.

description: A new browser tab opens to the Google homepage.
frame_description: The screen transitions from the Smartraveller site to a blank Google search page.

description: The user types 'travel i' into the Google search bar.
frame_description: Text appears in the central search box as the user types.

description: Google search suggestions dropdown appears as the user starts typing.
frame_description: A list of autocomplete suggestions appears below the search bar.

description: The user continues typing 'nsurance.com' into the search bar.
frame_description: The search query is completed in the input field.

description: The user hovers over the 'travel insurance comparison australia' suggestion in the dropdown.
frame_description: The cursor pauses over one of the autocomplete options.

description: The user selects the 'travel insurance comparison australia' suggestion from the list.
frame_description: The user clicks the chosen suggestion to trigger a search.

description: The Google search results page begins to load.
frame_description: The screen goes white briefly as the browser requests the search results page.

description: The Google search results page for 'travel insurance comparison australia' is loaded.
page_title: travel insurance comparison australia - Google Search
frame_description: The search results page is visible with several sponsored links at the top.

description: The user hovers over the first sponsored result from Compare the Market.
interaction_target: Compare the Market - Travel Insurance Australia link
frame_description: The cursor moves to and stays on the first search result link.

description: The user clicks on the Compare the Market travel insurance link.
interaction_target: Compare the Market - Travel Insurance Australia link
frame_description: The link is activated, initiating navigation to the external site.

description: The Compare the Market website begins loading.
frame_description: A blank white screen is shown while the destination page loads.

description: The Compare the Market travel insurance landing page is fully loaded.
page_title: Compare Travel Insurance | Compare the Market
frame_description: The landing page for Compare the Market travel insurance is visible, featuring a meerkat character.

description: The user hovers over the 'Compare now' button while reading the page.
frame_description: The cursor rests on the primary call-to-action button.

description: The user scrolls down the page to view more information.
frame_description: The page content moves upwards as the user scrolls down.

description: The user scrolls further down the page.
frame_description: The user continues to explore the page content by scrolling.

description: The user scrolls back up slightly.
frame_description: The page content moves downwards as the user scrolls up.

description: The user scrolls down again.
frame_description: The user scrolls down to a lower section of the page.

description: The user scrolls back to the top of the page.
frame_description: The user returns to the top of the landing page.

description: The user hovers over the 'Compare now' button again before deciding to click.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the yellow 'Compare now' button.

description: The user clicks the 'Compare now' button.
frame_description: The button is clicked to start the insurance comparison process.

description: A loading screen with 'Loading application...' appears.
frame_description: A loading spinner and text indicate the application is initializing.

description: The first step of the comparison funnel loads.
frame_description: The screen shows the first question: 'Where are you travelling to?'

description: The user hovers over the destination input field.
frame_description: The cursor is over the text box that says 'Select or start typing countries.'

description: The user clicks into the destination input field.
frame_description: The input field is focused.

description: A dropdown list of 'Popular Destinations' appears.
frame_description: A large menu opens showing countries categorized by region (Pacific, Asia, Europe, Other).

description: The user hovers over various destination options in the list.
frame_description: The cursor moves across different country names in the dropdown menu.
